steps.title: Undo the multiplication
steps.content: In $$b=36cf$$ the variable $c$ is multiplied by both $36$ and $f$. To isolate $c$, divide both sides by the full product $36f$.

steps.title: Isolate c
steps.content: Dividing gives $$\frac{b}{36f}=c$$ or equivalently $$c=\frac{b}{36f}$$ The answer is A.
